title: Indulgent and Pillowy Indian Rigatoni Pav Bhaji
description: A Mangalorean twist on the classic street food, featuring pillowy rigatoni, no onions, no garlic, and a resinous flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Mangalorean Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Custom blend of cinnamon, cardamom, nutmeg, and cloves.

instructions: Heat 2 tbsp butter in a tava-griddle over medium heat.
Add 2 tbsp mangalorean spice blend and saut7 for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add 2 tbsp ginger paste and 1 cup tomato puree, cooking for 3 minutes, until the mixture thickens slightly.
Add 2 cups water, salt, and 1 tsp nigella seeds, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add 1 cup yogurt, 1 cup cheese shreds (if using), and 1 tsp corn flour, stirring until smooth.
Add 500g rigatoni to the tava-griddle and cook for 5-7 minutes, until slightly toasted, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and nigella seeds.
Garnish with nigella seeds and serve immediately.
